meaning: n.唱诗班歌手,唱诗队指挥
examples: They all knew me as the girl from Brooklyn, the chorister who went to public school.
The position of head chorister motivated me into applying to the highly competitive and prestigious LaGuardia High School.
Parry: Hubert Parry's anthem "I was Glad" is something I loved singing when I was boy chorister, but now usually seems over the top to me.
Rutter fell in love with Christmas carols when he was a chorister in grade school, but he gradually became more ambitious.
As a boy, Berkeley was a chorister at Westminster Cathedral.
